title: Clean Redstone - rails and minecarts
description: Gives a clean look to rails and minecarts
body:
If you want to publish a project containing my work, please mention my username "Vunyx" somewhere. Also, a link to my project would be much appreciated.

# Description
This resource pack gives a **clean look** to rails and minecarts.
It is intended to be used in combination with my other packs [Clean Redstone - main components](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-main-components) and [Clean Redstone - extra components](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/clean-redstone-extra-components), but it also works fine without them.

The affected blocks and entities are:
- rails
- powered rails
- detector rails
- activator rails
- all types of minecarts

![assortment of rails and minecarts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efa4aabba56cad685ae3e45570c2f1c03460f999.png)

# How to install
After downloading the resource pack, go to **options -> resource packs** and click the **Open Pack Folder** button, or open `%appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks` directly. Put the resource pack in this folder. It should then show up under **Available**. Click the arrow to switch it to the **Selected** tab and click **Done**. That's it, the pack should now be installed properly.
